title: narcissus poeticus subsp. angustifolius
intro: Narcissus poeticus subsp. angustifolius, also known as the narrow-leaved poetic daffodil, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to contain alkaloids that have antimicrobial and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Narcissus poeticus subsp. angustifolius include its potential to help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, making it a popular herbal remedy for these conditions. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
